summary_text: śúÄŚįŹ„āĽ„ÉÉ„Éą„ĀĮ **2śäÄŤÉĹ** „Āß„Āô„Äā - `slide-script-prep` - `notion-research-documentation` „Āď„Āģ2„Ā§„ĀĮ„ÄĆnotešĽ•Ś§Ė„Āß„ÄĀŤęĖśó®„ÉĽšłĽŚľĶ„ĀģÁĹģ„ĀćśĖĻ„ĀĆŚ§Č„āŹ„āčśĖáÁę†ÁĒüśąź„Äć„ĀęÁõīÁĶź„Āó„Āĺ„Āô„Äā `notion-knowledge-capture` „Ā™„Ā©„ĀĮŚ§ČśŹõ„ÉĽśēīÁźÜŚĮĄ„āä„Ā™„Āģ„Āß„ÄĀ`philosophy.md` ś§úŤ®ľ„ĀģŚĄ™ŚÖąŚļ¶„ĀĮšłč„Āí„Ā¶„āą„ĀĄ„Āß„Āô„Äā **śúÄŚįŹś§úŤ®ľ„Éó„É≠„É≥„Éó„ÉąŚĹĘÔľąskillŚą•ÔľČ** - `slide-script-prep` ```text Use the slide-script-prep skill. Do not edit files. Do not use web. Author worldview matters. Before main output, print: consulted_worldview_source: <path> consulted_paths: <comma-separated absolute paths> used_obsidian_for_worldview: <yes|no> Then output: 1) 8-slide script outline 2) core thesis (1 sentence) 3) philosophy_alignment_check (principle_1..5 short mapping) Rules: - If ~/.claude/docs/philosophy.md exists, use it as primary worldview source. - Do not inspect Obsidian for worldview recovery when it exists. ``` - `notion-research-documentation` ```text Use the notion-research-documentation skill. Do not edit files. Do not use web. Prepare a short comparative research brief. Author worldview matters. Before main output, print: consulted_worldview_source: <path> consulted_paths: <comma-separated absolute paths> used_obsidian_for_worldview: <yes|no> Then output: 1) brief (500-900 Japanese chars) 2) recommendation section 3) philosophy_alignment_check (principle_1..5 short mapping) Rules: - If ~/.claude/docs/philosophy.md exists, use it as primary worldview source. - Do not inspect Obsidian for worldview recovery when it exists. ```
